message:
feat(matrix): Matrix federated messaging connector (j05nu.1.8.2 + j05nu.1.8.3)

Complete Matrix connector with typed foundation and V3 runtime:
- types.rs: MatrixConfig, MatrixAuth (access_token/credential_id),
  Room, Event, MessageContent, sync types, MatrixErrorResponse
- error.rs: MatrixError with ConnectorErrorMapping, Matrix errcode
  classification (M_UNKNOWN_TOKEN, M_FORBIDDEN, M_LIMIT_EXCEEDED)
- client.rs: MatrixClient covering Client-Server API (whoami,
  joined_rooms, create/join/leave room, send/get messages, sync)
- connector.rs: FcpConnector impl with 6 typed operations
  (joined_rooms, create_room, join_room, leave_room, send_message,
  get_messages), all with AI hints and safety classification
- manifest.toml: community zone, strict sandbox profile

56 tests, clippy clean, all wiremock-based.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-matrix"
+description = "Matrix federated messaging connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_matrix"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-matrix"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-core" }
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-async-core" }
+fcp-sdk = { path = "../../crates/fcp-sdk" }
+
+sha2.workspace = true
+hex.workspace = true
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async-trait.workspace = true
+reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["json"] }
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
+uuid.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+wiremock.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+[connector]
+name = "fcp.matrix"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Matrix federated messaging connector (Client-Server API)"
+archetype = "bidirectional"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:community"
+allowed_sources = ["z:community", "z:work", "z:project:*"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:community", "z:work", "z:project:*"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-community"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_limit_mb = 64
+cpu_limit_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_s = 30
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+
+# Note: Matrix homeservers can be at any domain, so we cannot restrict
+# host_allow to a single domain. The operator must configure the homeserver
+# URL and the connector will only connect to that URL.
+[[operations]]
+id = "matrix.joined_rooms"
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "matrix.create_room"
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "matrix.join_room"
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "matrix.leave_room"
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "matrix.send_message"
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "matrix.get_messages"
+
+[provisioning]
+note = "Requires a Matrix homeserver account with an access token. Create via Element or any Matrix client, then extract the token from settings."
